summary: Iteration 97 - Testing PWA implementation (manifest.json, sw.js, PWAInstallPrompt), My Portal sidebar link, Schedule page responsive columns, and regression tests. All features verified working.

issues: Console hydration warnings: span inside tbody/tr/th - Non-breaking React iteration pattern issue caused by dev tooling. App works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: PWA manifest.json correctly configured with name='SSC Track - Business Management', display='standalone', theme_color='#f97316', and both 192x192 and 512x512 icons
Service worker (sw.js) properly registered with cache versioning (v3), static asset caching, API caching for offline use, and push notification support
PWAInstallPrompt component implemented with iOS detection, deferred prompt handling, dismiss persistence (7-day cooldown), and proper styling
My Portal link correctly positioned at top of sidebar for BOTH admin and operator users (above OPERATIONS section)
Schedule page attendance table has proper responsive columns: Late/Absent use 'hidden sm:table-cell', Overtime uses 'hidden md:table-cell'
DashboardLayout.jsx line 332-337 correctly adds My Portal link with data-testid='nav-my-portal-top' for non-employee users

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified working across desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 verified: 1) PWA manifest accessible at /manifest.json with correct name, display mode, and icons (icon-192.png, icon-512.png), 2) Service worker at /sw.js registered and working with cache strategies, 3) PWAInstallPrompt component exists and handles install flow (data-testid='pwa-install-banner'), 4) My Portal link visible at TOP of sidebar for both admin and operator users (href='/my-portal'), 5) Schedule page /schedule loads with responsive attendance table - Late/Absent hidden on mobile (<640px), Overtime hidden until md (768px+), 6) Regression tests passed: Dashboard, Invoices (pagination), Cash Transfers, Customers pages all load correctly. Console hydration warnings are dev tooling artifacts - app functions correctly.

schedule_responsive.mobile_test_390px: Only Employee, Scheduled, Present, Attendance % visible

console_warnings: Hydration warning: span inside tbody/tr/th - This is caused by Emergent dev tooling injecting wrapper elements. The app functions correctly despite these warnings.
